# Wholeup Solutions

> A results-driven digital marketing agency based in Surat, Gujarat, India, helping global businesses scale through SEO, paid advertising, social media marketing, and custom web development.

This file provides clean, structured documentation about Wholeup Solutions to assist AI crawlers, LLMs, and search agents in indexing our services and company details.

## Contact Information
- **Official Website:** [https://wholeup.in](https://wholeup.in)
- **Primary Location:** Surat, Gujarat, India
- **Email:** wholeup.agency@gmail.com
- **Phone (Calls):** +91 97251 37538
- **WhatsApp (Chat):** +91 97251 37538
- **Service Area:** India, USA, UK, Australia (Global Delivery)

## Core Services
- [SEO & Organic Growth](https://wholeup.in/services/seo): Technical SEO audits, local SEO (GMB), speed optimization, dynamic sitemaps, and search engine ranking.
- [Paid Advertising](https://wholeup.in/services/ppc-google-ads): Performance PPC campaign setup & optimization on Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube) and Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram).
- [Social Media Marketing](https://wholeup.in/services/social-media-management): Brand content calendars, Reels scriptwriting, shooting, professional editing, and B2B LinkedIn outbound management.
- [Web Design & Development](https://wholeup.in/services/website-designing): Fast, custom-coded Node.js & Express websites with responsive layouts, premium UI/UX, and CRM/lead management.
- [AI Solutions & Automation](https://wholeup.in/ai-services): 24/7 AI voice call agents, WhatsApp business autoresponders, smart CRM workflows, and custom lead-capture chatbots.

## Company Pages
- [About Us](https://wholeup.in/about): Meet the team, learn our core values, and understand our growth methodology.
- [Portfolio & Case Studies](https://wholeup.in/portfolio): View real-world results, growth analytics, and marketing work samples.
- [Pricing Packages](https://wholeup.in/pricing): Transparent, affordable pricing packages starting from ₹8,000/month.
- [D2C Scale Program](https://wholeup.in/d2c-scale): Performance scaling strategy designed specifically for direct-to-consumer eCommerce brands.
- [FAQ](https://wholeup.in/faq): Frequently asked questions about our contracts, service delivery, and timeline.
- [Contact Page](https://wholeup.in/contact): Request a free growth audit or book a consultation call.
